response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified on-screen text "大きな愛でもてなして" and "作詞・作曲: つんく".
2. Determined the original artist is °C-ute.
3. Searched for "大きな愛でもてなして °C-ute Japanese and English lyrics".
4. Found the lyrics and compiled them into the scene data. The song is performed by Kazama Iroha.
response.global_summary: The video begins with the VTuber, Kazama Iroha, discussing and promoting merchandise commemorating her reaching 1 million subscribers. Following the merchandise introduction, she performs a cover of the song "Ookina Ai de Motenashite" by °C-ute.

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha introduces merchandise to commemorate 1 million subscribers.
Kazama Iroha performs the song "Ookina Ai de Motenashite". The song title is shown on screen.
